quickWins: Add schema.org FAQ markup to key pages
newIdeas: Add testimonials section with social proof
Implement dark mode toggle for accessibility
Add newsletter signup with value proposition

[Layout/Design] Consider grouping or summarizing lower-page sections: The homepage contains a large number of sections and headings. Consider turning some repeated patterns into carousels, tabs, or collapsible sections so decision-makers can scan the page more comfortably.
Address system intelligence audit findings (run system:intelligence-audit)
Implement CTA tracking for conversion funnel (run conversion:cta-implement)

[Layout/Design] Reduce link density above the fold: There are many links in the top portion of the page. Group related actions into concise clusters so the primary narrative and CTA are easier to scan, especially on mobile.

[Layout/Design] Ensure consistent max-width containers: Not all content appears to be wrapped in a consistent max-width container. Use a shared layout wrapper (e.g., max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4) to keep content readable on large screens.

[Layout/Design] Confirm semantic main content region: The live HTML did not include a <main> element. Ensure the primary content is wrapped in a semantic main region for accessibility and layout clarity.

implementationTasks.description: Ensure all form inputs have visible labels and aria attributes
